data.title: AI shopping chatbots disrupting e-commerce dominated by Amazon, Walmart, eBay, Meta, Google. The article discusses the impact on major players in the industry.
data.description: The integration of AI technology is revolutionizing the e-commerce sector, with industry giants including Amazon, Walmart, eBay, and Meta introducing shopping chatbots. This development signifies a significant shift in the way online shopping is conducted. Companies like Amazon, Walmart, Meta, and Google are at the forefront of this transformation.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $120k, holds 2-month high amid govt shutdown. Crypto stock surges 150%, Bakkt streamlines efforts.
data.description: The prices of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies are on the rise, with Bitcoin reaching a 2-month high above $120,000 amidst a government shutdown. Bakkt, a cryptocurrency platform, is making significant advancements in transformation and streamlining processes, leading to a 150% surge in its stock value.
BOFA GLOBAL RESEARCH PULLS FORWARD US FED RATE CUT FORECAST TO OCTOBER FROM DECEMBER THIS YEAR

data.title: COSRX sponsors Paris Fashion Week, 1st Korean brand to do so, collaborating for 2 shows - Courrèges &...
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Paris, the renowned K-beauty brand COSRX made a triumphant return to Paris Fashion Week after a successful backstage debut earlier in the year. This time, they partnered with international artist agency RAVE to sponsor two highly anticipated shows during the week. The collaboration included sponsoring the Courrèges show on September 30, showcasing their beauty products to a global audience. This strategic partnership at one of the biggest fashion events in the world highlights COSRX's growing influence in the beauty and fashion industry.

BITCOIN POISED FOR NEW HIGH, SAYS STANDARD CHARTERED Standard Chartered’s Geoff Kendrick says Bitcoin could hit a new record if the U.S. government shutdown drags on, noting its positive correlation with Treasury term premiums. StanChart forecasts Bitcoin at $135,000 soon and

data.title: Black Creator Academy reopens applications for second cohort to help Black youth creators, addressing $250 billion creator economy opportunity.
data.description: In Toronto, the Black Creator Academy has opened applications for its second cohort after a successful inaugural year. This program aims to support emerging Black creators by providing them with essential skills, mentorship, and funding to participate in the rapidly growing creator economy, which is currently valued at $250 billion. The Academy seeks to address the underrepresentation of Black youth in this industry and help them establish their presence.

data.title: UKG's survey: Retailers preparing for busy holidays, face staffing challenges. Increasing reliance on AI for workforce solutions.
data.description: With Black Friday just around the corner, retailers in the U.S. are preparing for the holiday shopping season. A recent survey conducted by UKG found that many retail executives and managers are concerned about staffing shortages. The sixth-annual Retail Holiday Hiring Survey shows that retailers are turning to AI-powered workforce management tools to tackle this issue. As the countdown to Black Friday begins, retailers are ramping up their efforts to address the challenges ahead.

data.title: Coherus Oncology to present CHS-114 at SITC, a potential cancer treatment in webinar on Oct 22, 2025.
data.description: An upcoming webinar series by SITC scheduled for October 22, 2025 will showcase CHS-114, an anti-CCR8 cytolytic antibody. This antibody will be highlighted in the webinar titled "Targets for Cancer IO: A Deep Dive," providing insights into its potential impact in the field of cancer immunotherapy. This event aims to delve deeper into the features and applications of CHS-114, shedding light on its role as a promising candidate for cancer treatment. Stay tuned to learn more about the innovative developments surrounding this antibody.

data.title: Litecoin surges 16% in a week ahead of potential ETF approval, reaching $117.88 price with a $9 billion market cap.
data.description: Litecoin (LTC) has surged by 15.8% in the past week amid a U.S. government shutdown impacting the dollar's value, consequently driving up digital asset performance. The current prices and market cap for some cryptocurrencies are as follows: Litecoin trading at $117.88 with a market cap of $9 billion, experiencing a 14.6% increase. XRP is priced at $3.03 with a market cap of $181.9 billion, reflecting a 9.9% rise. Solana is valued at $230.46 with a market cap of $125.7 billion, showing a 17% growth. Notably, crypto trader DonAlt suggests that Litecoin holds potential for further increase, hinting at a potential short-term surge. Elliottwave Forecast also indicates a potential upward corrective movement for LTC. The latest insights and complete coverage can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Halsey Festival in Newark attracts thousands on Sept 18, boosting community spirit with music, food, and local businesses.
data.description: Newark's renowned Halsey Street corridor hosted its yearly event that brought together the local businesses, artists, and creators of the city, contributing to the community's overall welfare on October 3, 2025. The Halsey Festival, a prominent occasion in Newark, served as a platform for culture, unity, and supporting small businesses.

data.title: PST Group AB received notice from AB “HISK” about acquiring voting rights in the Company.
data.description: PST Group AB has been notified by AB “HISK” about acquiring voting rights in the company. The specific details of the acquisition are included in the notification that was received.

data.title: Global conversational AI market estimated to grow from $12.82B in 2025 to $136.41B by 2035, at 23.98% CAGR - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
data.description: A report on the Conversational AI Market Industry Trends and Global Forecasts predicts significant growth in the sector. The global market size for conversational AI is expected to increase from USD 12.82 billion in 2025 to USD 136.41 billion by 2035. This suggests a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 23.98% during the forecast period. The report covers various aspects such as the type of conversational AI, deployment, technology, end user, enterprise, business model, and key geographical regions.

data.title: Construction drone market valued at US$4.6B in 2024, projected to reach US$7.1B by 2030, growing at CAGR of 7.7%.
data.description: A recent global strategic business report on Construction Drones has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The estimated value of the construction drones market was US$4.6 billion in 2024, with a projected growth to US$7.1 billion by 2030, showcasing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.7% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers a thorough examination of market trends, drivers, and forecasts, aiding in making well-informed business choices. The utilization of construction drones is rapidly increasing.

data.title: Extraordinary General Meeting of Minesto AB took place on Oct. 3, 2025, in Gothenburg at MAQS Advokatbyrå's premises.
data.description: An Extraordinary General Meeting took place today, October 3, 2025, in Gothenburg, Sweden, for Minesto AB (publ). The meeting was held at MAQS Advokatbyrå's location at Masthamnsgatan 13. Eric Ehrencrona, a lawyer from MAQS Advokatbyrå, served as the Chairperson for the meeting.

data.title: Mitsubishi Tanabe Pharma America to showcase 4 poster presentations on ND0612 at 2025 Parkinson's Congress.
data.description: Today, in Jersey City, N.J., Mitsubishi Tanabe Pharma America, Inc. (MTPA) revealed that they will be presenting four posters regarding the investigational drug ND0612 for Parkinson's disease (PD) at the 2025 International Congress of Parkinson's Disease and Movement Disorders®. The event is set to showcase important findings on the drug's potential benefits in managing PD.

data.title: Brightspeed BEAD Program receives over $528M, will expand fiber network to 182.9K locations in 17 states, boosting high-speed internet access in rural areas.
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that funding has been secured to extend multi-gig-speed internet access to 182,900 more locations in rural America. Brightspeed, a major fiber broadband provider based in Charlotte, N.C., spearheads this initiative. This development aims to bridge the connectivity gap in remote areas, benefiting both households and businesses.

data.title: Interface, Inc. will release Q3 2025 results on Oct 31 and host conference call; market opens after release.
data.description: Interface plans to announce its Q3 results for 2025 on Friday, October 31st, 2025, before the market opens.

data.title: GoPro introduces Fluid Pro AI Gimbal for all cameras; available for preorder. - Key numbers: announcement made on Oct. 3, 2025.
data.description: A versatile gimbal designed to cater to various cameras, the Fluid Pro AI gimbal is a notable release by GoPro. This innovative product offers AI tracking and stabilization features suitable for GoPro cameras, smartphones, and compact point-and-shoot cameras. On October 3, 2025, GoPro revealed that the gimbal is open for preorder. Excitingly, interested individuals can now secure their units to experience this cutting-edge technology. The company's announcement demonstrates its commitment to providing enhanced filming experiences for users across different devices.

data.title: UtilityInnovation Group appoints Jon Rodriguez as President of Energy Centers to drive data center power solutions in North America.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, in Raleigh, North Carolina, UtilityInnovation Group (UIG) revealed the selection of Jon Rodriguez as the President of Energy Centers. This new position is dedicated to providing advanced power solutions for the increasing number of data centers across North America. The emphasis is on accommodating the swift growth of data centers in the region.

data.title: UST wins 3 CandE awards for candidate experience; ranked number 1 in EMEA region. Recognition in North America, EMEA, and APAC.
data.description: UST, a renowned AI and technology transformation solutions company, has received prestigious recognition as the number one overall rank for the EMEA region. The accolade includes their achievement as a CandE Benchmark Research Award Winner for candidate experience. This recognition was announced on October 3, 2025, in Aliso Viejo, California.
